---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# JuliaFormatter

```{julia}
# format all project(.jl, .qmd, .jmd, .md)
using JuliaFormatter
format(".")
```            

If you have some specific demand, create a file named `.JuliaFormatter.toml` in the project root, and write the configuration in it, for instance:

```{text}
style = "blue"
margin = 92
always_for_in = true
whitespace_typedefs = true
whitespace_ops_in_indices = true
remove_extra_newlines = true
```
